title: Triage ledger
description: A list of finding dispositions applied to the cumulative review ledger. Every entry must carry a non-empty fingerprint (so a gate-affecting closure is auditable) and a recognized status. Validated in full before any disposition is applied.

finding_id.description: Canonical review id (F-N) of the cumulative finding this disposition releases or re-blocks. A malformed id is silently ignored by the merge, so it is rejected here rather than misreported as recorded.
